text.message: Green you want 8 4 coast or 9 4 2 up?
i might just build into wheat if i can, prob not coast
I told myself I would do 9 4 2 in your position
paypal me 10 bucks and ill consider leaving it for you
Your 1st pick is probably too strong for us to compete anyways
exactly why you dont judge so quick lol
Yeah i usually get obliterated when I take a spot like that
cant do 2:1 when im last, sorry
yeah black its safe to say you are far in the lead lol
Just spread the love when we are even :)
there ya go blue, dont hustle the poorest man lol
bruh you were trynna get the board to rally against me before the dice rolled lol
you getting all the love lol
I said when we are even :)
there ya go, lets get cities together my friend
how do I have no wood all game
we need someone on the devs. black steam rolls us here
we're on the same ore lol
yup. might be cooked for us
cant trade black anything bro, omg...
blue we need devs together to keep the 10 unblocked
i might need 6 wheat unblocked to pop as well. maybe the 4 brick
but ig he gets 2 wheat so i understand the block
blue i have no knights, we need you on army, ill help if i can
youre on 7 without army, games over if you get it lol
not if the 3 has anything to say about it lol
need to get the devs blue
i have knights but leaving on my 6 wheat
okay red might be it now lol
still think blue shouldve gotten the devs over the city
I bought city and dev that turn
think you shouldve just gone crazy with the devs and secure army
Near end of the game anyways
